title: Stress Hormone Prolactin May Be Stealing Your Hair
description: Prolactin — the hormone most people associate with breastfeeding — turns out to be a potent regulator of hair follicle cycling, and stress drives it up. This piece examines the hormonal mechanism linking psychological stress to hair shedding, what the evidence actually shows (and doesn't), and why a paradoxical finding from pituitary tumor patients complicates the clean narrative.
category: Clinical Evidence — approved despite category saturation because this fills the Dermatology subject gap (zero prior coverage) and the dermatology bonus score justifies the exception.
